arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta defends Arsenal's defensive tactics against Man City - claiming he would have been 'very thick' not to sit deep with 10-men
arts.sum: Arteta defended his tactics, referring to Arsenal's 5-0 defeat to Manchester City in 2021 when former captain Granit Xhaka was sent off.

arts.ttl: Arsenal icon insists Gunners' 'dark arts' should be CELEBRATED after Man City draw
arts.sum: Arsenal have come in for criticism for the way they set about defending their lead against Manchester City but not everyone is opposed the the approach from Mikel Arteta's team

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta responds to accusations Arsenal used ‘dark arts’ against Manchester City
arts.sum: The Arsenal manager says his team learnt from past encounters with Manchester City

arts.ttl: Report: What Leandro Trossard told his Arsenal teammates in the dressing room after being sent off vs Man City
arts.sum: Refereeing decisions were once again at the centre of the conversation this weekend as Arsenal played Manchester City. The Gunners came away from the Etihad...

arts.ttl: Whether Manchester City can recall Kalvin Phillips from Ipswich Town after Rodri injury

arts.sum: Sky Sports' Paul Merson is back with his latest column, reflecting on Man City's pulsating 2-2 draw with Arsenal and the threat the Gunners now pose to the Premier League champions...

arts.ttl: Why Erling Haaland isn’t playing for Man City against Watford tonight
arts.sum: Haaland, who has scored 10 goals in just five Premier League matches, won’t be in the squad for the Carabao Cup third-round clash

arts.ttl: Rodri pictured in Spain for reported ACL tests
arts.sum: Manchester City midfielder Rodri has been pictured arriving in Spain reportedly ahead of tests on a right knee injury sustained against Arsenal in the English Premier League at the weekend.

arts.ttl: How Manchester City could replace injured Rodri
arts.sum: The Spain midfielder could be facing an extended spell on the sidelines after suffering a knee injury against Arsenal
